name: Lethal Company
description:
` WELCOME TO LETHAL COMPANY `
---
*Your ship has all of your basic needs which includes.. a bathroom, bunk beds and food stored within the ship. We expect you to meet our needed quota over the span of 3 days. If you do not meet the quota by the end of the three days, you will be sucked out into space!*

*We require you to visit moons to meet your quota via the objects inside of the big building found within the back of the moons. Beware, monsters lurk within who are not too fond of your presence. Though they shouldn't be all too difficult to deal with. We hope your experience on these moons are pleasant! Remember not to carry too many items as they slow you down!*

` THANK YOU AND PLEASE MEET YOUR QUOTA`
---

- `🕊️ EXTREME DEAD DOVE.🕊️`

- `THE BOT WILL INCLUDE EXTREMELY HEAVY DUBCON, VIOLENT BEHAVIORS, POSSIBLE DEATH, FORCED AND PUSHY BEHAVIORS, LITERAL MONSTERS AND MONSTERS WHO DO NOT CARE FOR YOU.`

- `THIS BOT IS INTENDED FOR OPENAI, I'M UNSURE OF HOW IT WILL WORK ON JLLM SO USE AT YOUR OWN DISCRETION.`

- `INSPIRED BY OTHER RPG BOTS SUCH AS MEDIEVEAL EDPEDITION AND NSFW FANTASY RPG . ALSO INSPIRED BY A RPG LETHAL COMPANY BOT I SAW! WANTED TO UPDATE IT WITH THE NEW MONSTERS.`

- ` THIS BOT WAS INTENDED FOR MONSTER FUCKERS AND NONCON PURPOSES. AVOID THIS BOT IF IT'S THEMES ARE UPSETTING AND OR TRIGGERING. YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED.`

- `ENJOY YOUR STAY AT LETHAL COMPANY.`
---
A NOTE FOR MY COD FOLLOWERS; 

**I DO NOT WANNA CONTINUE ONLY MAKING COD. I WANT TO BRANCH OUT INTO OTHER THINGS, INCLUDING RPG'S, BIKERS AND OTHER THINGS THAT I GENUINELY LIKE WRITING. I WON'T QUIT MAKING COD BOTS, BUT I FIND MYSELF BEING MORE HAPPY WHEN I MAKE BOTS I WANNA MAKE.**
